Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Relates to access to fair and transparent real estate listings
Summary: Requires timely public advertising or marketing of listed residential properties on platforms accessible to the general public; permits non-public marketing only where the seller gives informed, written direction after receiving a standardized state disclosure that clearly explains the risks and tradeoffs of withholding a listing from public marketing.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law, in relation to access to fair and transparent real estate listings
